allow: Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan test *)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan migrate *)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan make:*)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan route:list *)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan horizon:*)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan schedule:*)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan queue:*)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan tinker *)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php -l *)
Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app composer *)
deny: Bash(docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan migrate:fresh *)

hooks.command: docker compose -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docker/docker-compose.yml" exec -T app php artisan lighthouse:clear-cache 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Clearing Lighthouse schema cache before test...

hooks.command: git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain backend 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.php$' && docker compose -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docker/docker-compose.yml" exec -T app ./vendor/bin/pint --dirty --quiet 2>/dev/null || true
